actor_claims.quote_text: The Mac-Gray Board of Directors formed a special committee of six disinterested and independent directors to, among other things, review and evaluate the merger agreement proposal, consider and evaluate alternatives available to Mac-Gray and alleviate any potential conflicts of interest.

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: After careful consideration, our Board of Directors, upon the unanimous recommendation of the special committee, unanimously approved the merger agreement and determined that the merger and the other transactions contemplated by the merger agreement are advisable and in the best interests of Mac-Gray and our stockholders.
